name: PanelLayerDefinition
description: Creates panel-free Layer definitions for exterior, core, and interior layers. Pass the output to CT_Panel's 'layers' input.

inputParameters.name: core_start
inputParameters.description: Offset from the panel face where the core layer begins.

inputParameters.name: core_end
inputParameters.description: Offset from the panel face where the core layer ends.

inputParameters.name: exterior_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the exterior layer. Defaults to 'Exterior Layer'.

inputParameters.name: core_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the core layer. Defaults to 'Core Layer'.

inputParameters.name: interior_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the interior layer. Defaults to 'Interior Layer'.

outputParameters.name: layers
outputParameters.description: List of Layer definitions (exterior, core, interior) with layer_path set.
